title: China's persistent record coal imports
summary:
Main
Image reference: RGB_COLOR_BRS_SHIPBROKERS_MONOGRAM_LOGO.png | assets/2024-11-05_chinas-persistent-record-coal-imports_img_rgb-color-brs-shipbrokers-monogram-l_ee79606c8e74.png
According to data from the General Administration of Customs, Chinese coal imports climbed to new heights again in September, reaching 47.6 mln mt, a y-o-y increase of 12.9%. This surpasses the record 47.3 mln mt set in December 2023. With the release of September's figures, it now appears certain that Chinese annual coal imports will exceed 500 mln mt for the first time.
